TempMail VPS
HomeDeveloper APIsConsolesSystem Status
LoginSign Up
APIReference

TempMail VPS REST endpoints

Receive Mail Endpoints

API Server localhost:8081
APIGet Active Domains
GET/api/domains

Get Active Domains

Fetch a list of all active domains available for generating temporary email addresses. Use this list to let users choose a domain before generation.

Returns: JSON Object
Auth: None Required
curl -X GET "http://localhost:8081/api/domains"
JSON — Payload
No request body required

Response

200 OKapplication/json
{
  "domains": [
    "llamerada.online",
    "tempemail.vps"
  ]
}
